allow: Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod/v4'\); console.log\('zod v4 ok'\)")
Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); console.log\('zod ok, version:', z.z?.version || 'unknown'\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('pdf-parse'\); console.log\(typeof p, Object.keys\(p\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const {PDFParse} = require\('pdf-parse'\); const p = new PDFParse\(\); console.log\(typeof p.loadPDF, typeof p.text, Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const {PDFParse} = require\('pdf-parse'\); const p = new PDFParse\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\).join\(', '\)\)")
